title: More Ocean Survival
description: This modpack introduces additional adventuring opportunities to Minecraft's oceans!
body:
Oceans are decent in Minecraft already, this mod pack makes them even better!

New Ships, Weather, Bosses & so much more!

Every day a storm has a chance to appear, you can craft your own boat or build a custom ship. Take to the skies with the help of airships, sail the seas in search of villages, structures, and most importantly.. BOSSES!

🚢Mods & Features🌊

Distant Horizons - See more of the land.

Critters and Companions + Alex's mobs - More cool mobs to find!

Eureka Ships! + Valkyrien Skies/Sails - Build your own ship, to fly or sail!

Wi Zoom - Seeing farther has just gotten easier.

When Dungeons Arise - More bosses to fight!

Yungs Better Ocean Monuments - Better ocean monuments basically.

Weather Storms & Tornadoes - The sky is now more active than ever!

Small Ships - Upgraded ships for more adventuring!

Jei - Makes it easier to craft.

Aquaculture Delight - Got to love more in game food!

Awesome Dungeon Ocean - More structures!

Aquamirae - THE main boss of this mod pack... Good Luck!

FPS Boosting mods - Helps with FPS.


This modpack adds more opportunities to adventure the wide oceans of Minecraft with Structures you can find and explore, Bosses you can fight, Ships you can build, and a chance of storms every day.


⚠️Heads up⚠️
This modpack is not meant for public servers! "Private servers with this mod pack do have some bugs."

This modpack was made to be played on single player worlds.
